title: LegacyBob
description: LegacyBob is a mod that implements view bobbing from before 1.13.
body:
# LegacyBob

LegacyBob is a Minecraft mod designed for the more modern versions of minecraft, LegacyBob restores the old view bobbing mechanic that many people enjoy. With mechanics like your camera tilting down as you fall so it actually looks like your falling, it offers an improved experience for mainly casual players. Compatible with both Fabric and NeoForge, it’s ideal for players who prefer how the game felt in the older versions of the game.

![Hand Extending as you fall exactly like 1.12 and below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeBwF2ij/images/9548f8d9a763b6701a0494767cc848bb5cfd72d8.png)
